heading: Without using Provisioned IOPS on MongoDB Atlas on AWS, what kind of IOPS should I expect?
body:
Atlas provides an estimate of how many 16K IOPS (Input/Output Operations per Second) you can expect,
calculated as the lesser of 3 IOPS (Input/Output Operations per Second) per provisioned GB, or the cluster
node's maximum IOPS (Input/Output Operations per Second) capacity.
